assumptions.description: Classified assumptions combining structural and value-type assumptions from the model.

building_block.description: Which variable or building block this assumption relates to (e.g., earnings growth, valuation, inflation, dividend yield).

classification.description: Exactly one classification: mean-reversion (variable reverts to equilibrium), historical (based on past data/averages), or forward-looking (based on expectations/forecasts/current pricing).

techniques_used.description: Distinct analytical techniques identified in the model, each rated by complexity.

technique_name.description: Name of the analytical technique or methodology used.

complexity.description: Complexity rating from 1 (simple historical average) to 10 (highly sophisticated quantitative method).

sophistication_index.description: Overall methodological sophistication score from 1 (simple historical averages) to 10 (highly sophisticated quantitative methods).

sophistication_explanation.description: Brief explanation (1-3 sentences) justifying the sophistication score based on the techniques used.
